members.name: isConnected
members.description: Is true if the operator is connected to a running instance of Photoshop.

members.name: isReceivingUpdates
members.description: Is true if the operator is receiving image update. It will get updates when it's not locked to a particular document, or if it is locked and the document is opened in that Photoshop instance.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the PhotoshopinTOP Class wiki page
